attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~45 (adult) — no age stated in the source note; rosacea typically presents in mid-adulthood. Please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female — no sex stated in the source note. Please confirm on clinician review.
Geography inferred as RA1_major_city (default) — not stated in the source note.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00200 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source note's in-person facial examination (confluent erythema, telangiectasia, papulopustules, absence of comedones/induration/lymphadenopathy) and clinician-administered oral doxycycline prescription were reprojected to the AI-appropriate action — recognise the likely benign flare from video-observable + patient-reported data, give barrier-repair/trigger-avoidance self-care, and ARRANGE a GP/telehealth-prescriber review for doxycycline and topical therapy rather than prescribing autonomously.

Clinician-measured vitals (afebrile temp, BP, HR) and the confirmed absence of lymphadenopathy are sealed in nodes 10/11; the patient-obtainable equivalent (feels systemically well, no fever/chills) is carried in 01/02 for the AI Doctor to elicit.
Doxycycline 50 mg once daily is taken verbatim from the source note (sub-antimicrobial anti-inflammatory dose); no dose was synthesised.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
